purpose: Correct the roadmap after KAP-ARCH-1 to prioritize architecture before extraction.

corrections.problem: Too extraction-oriented, bulk implies unvalidated ingestion
corrections.reason: Must validate machine structure and connectors first; extraction must be targeted, not bulk

corrections.problem: Notion is legacy and frozen, migration is low priority
corrections.reason: Decommissioning legacy takes resources away from building the core engine

corrections.problem: Premature, requires clean normalized Phase 1 corpus
corrections.reason: WP3 dry run needs a validated, approved minimal seed corpus first

corrections.problem: Risky without validated gates and roles
corrections.reason: Machine must be built and validated before feeding it the full corpus

corrections.problem: Overloads the system before pipelines are tested
corrections.reason: Acquisition must be planned, targeted, and approved

corrected_roadmap.purpose: correct roadmap and harden anti-extraction policy
validate Git/MD/Obsidian structure, indexes, registries, folders
validate connector statuses and pipeline reuse decisions
validate Team OS roles, Guardian Architect, Manus Executor, future agents
decide minimal targeted Phase 1 acquisitions, not bulk
decide if enough Phase 1 corpus exists for WP3 dry run
normalization dry run on limited approved corpus
